rulings.Case Title: ARKETHA MUNIR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Entire Action With Prejudice And For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 29, 2015, Line 3. DEFENDANTS CTC REAL ESTATE SERVICES, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Entire Action With Prejudice And For Entry Of Judgment. Defendant CTC Real Estate Services' Motion to Dismiss Entire Action with Prejudice is DENIED as premature. On January 14, 2015 the Court issued a tentative ruling sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend unless an amended complaint was filed prior to the hearing. No amended complaint has been filed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the demurrer. Prevailing party was to prepare an order. No order has been executed/entered. No notice of entry of order has been filed with the Court. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LAURENCE LOCKEY ET AL VS. KAREN HUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 29, 2015, Line 4. DEFENDANTS EDDY CHOY, MARIA CHOY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants Choys' Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C and Court's April 15, 2015 minute order. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK TU VS. ALEXANDER LABUNSKY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 29, 2015, Line 5. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER LABUNSKY'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions. Defendant's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Discovery is DENIED, Plaintiffs objections are sustained. Defendant is seeking irrelevant information, and information which cannot be provided by Plaintiff under oath; requests are overboard and unduly burdensome due to expansive definitions. Defendant's counsel is ordered to bind/staple his filings and courtesy copies in the future. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,000. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. EMILY WONDOLLECK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 29, 2015, Line 6. DEFENDANT LAUREN HOSTELTER'S (SUED AS HOSTETLE) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant Hostelter's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege complaint with or exemption from SFRO. Prevailing party to prepare order. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. =(501/AJR)
